id.description: Stable id used as the radio-group id prefix and as the hidden input id.

value.description:
Bindable rating value. `0` represents an unrated state. External values
are clamped into `[0, count]` and snapped to the nearest precision step.

**No write-back normalization.** The bound prop reflects exactly what the
consumer set — it is NOT mutated back to the clamped/snapped value. The
displayed and submitted value is normalized via `$derived`, but the binding
itself is left untouched. This is intentional: the consumer owns the source
of truth, and silent mutation of a bound prop is a surprising side-effect.

count.description:
Number of rating slots. Normalized to an integer in `[1, 10]`; non-finite
or out-of-range values fall back to `5`.

precision.description: Precision of each step. Defaults to `'whole'`.

label.description: Visible group label rendered above the rating.

hideLabel.description: Visually hide the rendered `label` while keeping it programmatically associated.

aria-label.description: Group accessible name when no visible `label` is supplied.

aria-labelledby.description: Space-separated list of ids that label the group when no `label` is supplied.

description.description: Optional description text rendered below the rating.

error.description: Optional error message; sets `aria-invalid="true"` on the rating group.

disabled.description: Disable every rating control and the hidden input.

readonly.description: Render a non-interactive display with an accessible text equivalent.

required.description: Mark the group as required for assistive technology.

name.description: Form-control name applied to the hidden `<input>` that submits with the form.

class.description: Extra class names appended to the root group element.

unsupportedProps.name: onchange
unsupportedProps.description:
Fires only for user-initiated committed value changes (click, arrow keys,
Space/Enter). Never fires for hover preview or external prop synchronization.
